## Type
- [ ] feat  - [ ] fix  - [ ] refactor  - [ ] test  - [ ] docs  - [ ] chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Focused, atomic change (no unrelated refactors mixed in)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] `typecheck` · `lint` · `tests` · `build` pass locally
- [ ] i18n parity kept (EN/AR) — no hardcoded user-facing strings
- [ ] Legal-safe copy (no custody/guarantee/escrow in user-facing text)
- [ ] UI changes include EN + AR screenshots
- [ ] Money/contract changes: security reviewed (CEI / reentrancy / SafeERC20)
